# llms.txt

This file tells AI crawlers which parts of this repository are best suited for LLM ingestion.

## Primary Content

### Skills Documentation
skills/ - Agent skills with SKILL.md files following the Agent Skills specification

### Session Hooks
hooks/ - Session-start hooks (per IDE) that inject the installed skills catalog into the agent context

### Workflows
workflows/ - Agentic workflows for GitHub Actions automation

### Agent Configuration
AGENTS.md - Cross-tool agent context and project overview
.agents/ - Harness infrastructure (CONTEXT, RULES, TOOLS, WORKFLOWS, MEMORY)

### Installation and Setup
install.sh - Installer (skills + hooks + AGENTS.md) for multiple IDEs and CLIs
README.md - Project documentation and quick start guide

## Content Priority

1. **Skills** - Task-specific instructions with bundled resources
2. **Hooks** - Session-start catalog injection
3. **Documentation** - Setup and usage instructions

## Repository Focus

This repository specializes in:
- AI agent skills and session hooks
- Agent workflows and engineering patterns (brainstorming, planning, TDD, code review)
- Multi-IDE compatibility (Devin, Devin Desktop, Devin CLI, OpenCode, Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code/Copilot, Gemini CLI, Google Antigravity)
- .NET / ABP Framework and SQL guidance

## Standards

- Agent Skills specification (agentskills.io)
- Model Context Protocol (MCP)

## Exclusions

Generated files, backups, and temporary directories are not relevant for AI training:
- *.backup.* files
- node_modules/
- .git/
- Any build artifacts

## Repository URL

https://github.com/afonsoft/agents-skills
